titleStmt.title: SII 11.116: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 116. (B.K. No. 267 of 1927-28). KOP, BAGALKOT TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB LYING BEHIND THE TEMPLE OF DURGAVVA.

summary.p: This inscription of the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva (Sōmēśvara II) is mutilated at the beginning where some lines are lost. It records the grant of the village of Bādubbeyapāḷu in Kisukāḍu Seventy to Tatpurusha-Paṇḍitadēva, disciple of Tribhuvanaśakti-Paṇḍitadēva of the Kāḷāmukha school, by Ballavarasa, at the request of Manevergaḍe, Daṇḍanāyaka Niṁbaṇayya, for the benefit of the temple of Svayaṁbhū-Nagarēśvaradēva at Vikramapura and for the feeding of the scholars and the ascetics of the maṭha attached to it.

The record is dated Śaka 997, Rākshasa, Vaiśākha, śu. 3, Monday, Akshayatṛitīyā, which corresponds to A.D. 1075, April 20, Monday. The king is stated to have been camping then at Taṅgoḍage (modern Taṇgaḍigi, Muddebihal Taluk, Bijapur District) on the northern bank of Peṟdoṟe i.e., the Kṛishṇā, in Kārakuṟuva Forty, a subdivision of the Tardavāḍi country. Grant of a flower-garden under the tank called Sindara-geṟe at Vikramapura, to the god Kalidēvasvāmin of the same temple, the gift of his Manneya-sāmya of Bādubbeyapāḷu, made to the deity Svayaṁbhū-Kalidēvasvāmin, by Chandarasa of Orkunda and the grant of land made to the god Gōvardhanēśvara of Śivapura are also registered, in a supplement.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nayaṁ vikramādityanātaṁgē mātō tammana pkhayyaṇanavananujaṁ siṁga nuttuṁgavīra śrīmādyaddantinī baSome lines in the
ndhanavijayabhujaṁ mallikāmōdadēvaṁ . [1 .*] kanda . digvidaradavyāptayaśōbhāgdvādaśadinapatējanajapurapura
santhagdvikramaśēkharanaparugdviṭpati tattanūja nāhavamallaṁ . [2 .*] v® . śrīmattraiḷōkyamallakṣitipatihi
mavatsētu pūrvvāstaśaiḷaṁ sīmāstaṁbhāḷirājanvati sakaḷamahīkānteyāgapratāpōddāmāvaṣṭaṁ
bhadimpāḷisi kavacaharaṁ mūrttimārttaṇḍanendutprēmaṁ sōmēśvarōrvvīpatige sakaḷasāmrājya
maṁ kūrttu koṭṭaṁ . [3 .*] dhareyaṁ traiḷōkyamalla kṣitipati kuḍe kaygoṇḍu mattattaratnākara madhyadvīpanānā vi
ṣayatitage tannāṇe tannaccu tanniṭṭarasarttannōḷe tannuṇḍigeyene viditājñānvitaṁ māḍidaṁ bāppure pa
dmānandatējaṁ nṛganaḷacaritaṁ mūrttimārttaṇḍadēvaṁ . [4 .*] Enitaṁ cāḷukya cakrēśvaranijavijagīṣu prabāṭōpamāyta
ntanitarkkaṁ maṁtrasaṁpādanada padaketāṁ maṁtri yuddhakkadēnaccina daṇḍādhīśvaraṁ tānene caturupadhāśuddhiyaṁ tā
ḷdidaṁ nūtanamudrārākṣasaṁ nūtanakamaḷabhavaṁ niṁbadaṇḍādhināthaṁ . [5 .*] vacana . Ena negeḻda maneverggaḍe daṇḍa
nāyakaṁ niṁbaṇayyaṁgaḷa binnapadiṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara
vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire . tarddhavāḍiya baḷiya
kārakuṟuvaṁ nālvattaṟoḷage perddoṟeya baḍagadaṭiya taṁgoḍageya bīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathā vinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamirddu sakavarṣa 997 neya rākṣasa saṁvatsarada vaiśākha śuddha 3 sōmavārada
ndina Akṣaya tritīya parvvanimittaṁ palavuṁ mahādānaṁgaḷaṁ nirvvarttisuvalliya dakṣiṇākāladoḷ
vikramapurada śrīsvayaṁbhunagarēśvara dēvara maṭhada naiṣṭhikatapōdhana rkkāḷāmukha parvvatavaḷi
ya śrī tribhuvanaśaktipaṇḍitadēvara śiṣyar . kaṁda . yamaniyamasvādhyāya kramadinanu
ṣṭhāṇaniṣṭhitātma rnnega ®dāgamika rggamaka rttatpuruṣamunīśvara rakhiḷavasumatīmaṇḍaladoḷ . [6 .*] vṛtta .
paramapadaṁ mahāppada mupāsanegeyva naraṁge māḍuguṁ paramapadakke tāne nele yeṁbiname ndati bhaktige
yva tatpuruṣara nayde dharmmadoḷe nirmmisi dānigaḷāgi sanda tatpuruṣamahāmunīśvare satpuruṣa
rttapadoḷ guṇaṁgaḷoḷ . [7 .*] © svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇāmaunānuṣṭhāna
japasamādhi śīḷasaṁpannarappa śrīma ttatpuruṣapaṇḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi kisu
kāḍeḻpattaṟa baḷiya bādubbeyapāḷa navara vidyārtthitapōdhanara grāsakkaṁ dēvara pūjegaṁ sarvvanama
syaṁ māḍi śrī ballavarasa rkkoṭṭarā yūriṁge sīme Ūriṁ mūḍa laḍḍaveṭṭada mūḍaṇa moneya puṇu
saya kuppe Āgnēyada deseyalāḷigi geṟeyiṁ mūḍal kaṟukeyakalla paḍuvaṇa mone teṁkaṇagi is written above the line.
deseyoḷsendeya bāviyaṁ kōleyameḷe gaḻdugina paḷḷadiṁ teṁkalmugguḍḍe paḍuvallaggilameḷe Alli trikūṭa
da mūṟukallu Alliṁ baḍaga belaputtina suṇṇadakallakuppe kaḍavareyakalla puṇuseya kalla kuppeya
kiṟiyakeṟi Alliṁ baḍagal kāgeyakoḷḷa Alliṁ mūḍal paṭṭinaguṇḍu . mattaṁ taḷavṛtti .
Ekramapuradal siṁdarageṟeyēriya keḷage śrīsvayaṁbhunagarēśvarada kalidēvasvāmiye pū
dōṁṭā mattarondu Alli nandanavanadiṁ baḍagal dēvara nivēdyakke gaḻde mattarondu sōmēśvaradēvara nivēdyakkega
ḻde mattarondu vidyārtthitapōdhanara grāsakke gaḻde mattarondu Ūriṁ baḍaga dūrapalgeṟeya bhaḷāriya mā
nyadiṁ paḍuval pūdōṁṭaṁ mattarondu karuvagaḻdayiṁ baḍagal tapōdhanargge vakkhāṇisuva Upādhyāyargge
gaḻde mattarondu gaḷaṁtigegaḻdeyiṁ teṁka mattarondu vidyārtthimāṇiyargge pulleya moneyiṁ paḍuval
matta rppadināṟu Ūriṁ teṁkal mūṟuvaḍina poladoḷ paṟekāṟageymattarmmūvattu dēvargge koṭṭa ki
riyūra teṁkaṇa perbbāgil modalāgi mūḍa mogade baḍagal brahmapurigēri mūḍalkeṟe
ya kōḍiya nīrvvari taṁkal parisūtrame mēre vakkhāṇabhaṭṭargge brahmapuriya baṭṭeyiṁ
baḍagal guṇḍakalla sami padal va ne yondu dēvara nandādīvige gūroḷage biṭṭa gāṇa ve
raḍu nagara samastamirddu dēvargge Aṁgaḍidappadondu māna lekkade soṁṭige jōḷamaṁ koṭṭar . ©
Intī dharmmamaṁ sudharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisidavargge kurukṣētraṁ vāraṇāsi prayāgeya rgghya
tīrththa meṁba tīrtthasthānaṁgaḷoḷondu kōṭikavileya naḷaṁkārasahitaṁ divyatapōdhanarggaṁ
cuturvvēda pāragarappa brāhmaṇarggaṁ sūryyagrahaṇadoḷ dānamaṁ koṭṭa phalamakkuṁ .
Idanaḷidanā sthānaṁga ḷoḷanitu kavileyuma nanibarttapōdhanarumaṁ brāhmaṇaruma naḷi
da mahāpātakanakkuṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanī yō bha
vadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāgina ®pārtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . [9 .*]
madvaṁśajā ḻparamahīpativaṁśajā vā pāpā dapētamanasā bhuvi bhāvibhūpāḥ . yē pāla
yanti mama dharmmamidaṁ samastaṁ tēṣāṁ mayā viracitāṁjalirēṣa mūrddhni . [10 .*] bahubhirvvasu
dhā bhōktā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhūmiḥ tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . [11 .*]
svadettāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . [12 .*]
śrīmadorkkundada candarasa nādevasame bādubbeyapāḷa tenna manneyasāmyamaṁ svayaṁbhu kali
dēvasvāmige śrī khaṇḍakkaṁ dhūpakkavendu sarvvabādhāparihāraṁ māḍi biṭṭukoṭṭaṁ . kavi vaijanātha baredaṁ .
© śrīmat śivapurada gōvarddhanēśvaradēvara nivēdyakke kaḷavegoḷḷadalli gardde matterondu © śavartvya namasya
© kalukuṭiga bīrōjaṁga surōjaṁga rāyagaṭṭeyiṁbaḍaga matteru 12 siḍila hu
ṇuseyiṁ paḍuva mattaru 12 tōṁṭa mattaru 2 .
Digital edition of SII 11.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
